description:
Humanity stands today on the brink of destruction. Nature is enraged. We have still been spared because a powerful saint has commanded nature not to destroy us as long as awareness programs continue and we follow their guidance. If we fail to follow the path shown by the saint, our karma will return to us, and nature will exact its punishment.
If humanity does not change its lifestyle, nearly 90% of the population could be wiped out by nature’s wrath. This is not merely an environmental crisis—it is the result of spiritual decay. We have exploited nature, killed innocent beings, and made intoxication, violence, and greed our way of life. Today, floods, droughts, earthquakes, pandemics, and climate change are all signs that nature is no longer warning us—it is punishing us.
All these events are happening because the cycle of time (Yug) is changing. Satyug is approaching. To remain safe in the coming age, humanity must adopt a pure and conscious life. A vegetarian, non-violent, and intoxication-free lifestyle is the path of Satyug.There is still time if we awaken now. Adopt a conscious and pure life:A fully vegetarian lifestyle,A life free from meat, eggs, and alcohol, Cruelty-free and nonviolent living
Respect for nature and environmental protection Take this vow today: starting today and forever, we will abstain completely from all intoxicants, alcohol, eggs, and meat.
If you love yourself, your siblings, spouse, children, and parents, then visit the Ashram at least once, attend the program, and receive the grace of God—the path of connection will be revealed to you. This program is offered entirely without any charges or fees to anyone. This is the true path, and only the Supreme Saint possesses the authority and power to bestow it as per the will of God.
If people and even entire countries follow the advice of the Great Soul or Saint (like Baba Jaigurudev), their people will be safe, and their nations will be protected from destruction. Live and Let Live—this is humanity’s true dharma.
Decide now:
If you do not awaken today, destruction is certain.
If you awaken today, both Earth and the future are safe.
Awaken. Transform. Align with Satyug. Follow the guidance of the Saints. Save nature, your life, Save your loved ones and your nation.
title: Message from the God
Pre-Shivratri Sadhana Message
description:
Before the sacred occasion of Shivratri, from 1st February to 17–18 February, all devotees are lovingly encouraged to prepare themselves by beginning Sadhana, Bhajan, and Dhyan (meditation).

This holy period is especially auspicious for inner purification, self-discipline, and deep spiritual practice. By regularly engaging in meditation on Shabd, heartfelt bhajan, and sincere sadhana, seekers can calm the mind, awaken divine awareness, and receive inner guidance and grace.
Let us utilize these sacred days with devotion, discipline, and remembrance, and move forward on the spiritual path with sincerity and faith.

From 24th to 27th January, devotees are lovingly invited to participate in Naamdhwani Akhand—a continuous remembrance and chanting of the Divine Name.

These sacred days offer a powerful opportunity to purify the mind, awaken inner consciousness, and strengthen our connection with Shabd through constant Naam remembrance. Let us come together in unity, faith, and devotion, dedicating ourselves to uninterrupted Naamdhwani for inner peace, spiritual upliftment, and divine grace.

May this Akhand Naamdhwani inspire collective harmony and guide all seekers on the path of truth.
title: Naamdhwani Akhand Message (24–27 January)

description:
The coming period is unprecedented and extremely challenging—beyond anything anyone can imagine. The Yug cycle is about to change, and Satyug (the Age of Truth) is approaching, marking the beginning of a 1000-year cycle of spiritual transformation.

Only those who are true devotees, who worship God and follow the Naamdaan (initiation of the Divine Name) bestowed by the God of God, will be able to survive.

To protect yourself and align with the divine plan, it is essential to follow the true path:

Abstain from alcohol, meat, eggs, and all intoxicants including bhang, ganja, and drugs.

Lead a life of purity, non-violence, and conscious awareness.

Become an observer of this transformative time and receive Naamdaan from Umanakant Ji Maharaj, who alone is empowered by God to guide humanity safely through this transition.

By embracing this path, you can protect yourself, your family, and all of humanity. The grace of the Saint acts as a shield in this war of the time cycle, guiding all sincere devotees safely into the era of Satyug.

Awaken now. Follow the true path. Receive Naamdaan. Save yourself, your loved ones, and all of humanity.
title: Message to the World: Prepare for the Coming Time
